title: Syrian-Style Gyro Wrap
description: A delicious and easy-to-make wrap filled with tasty syrian flatbread, juicy lamb, and crunchy veggies.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Season the lamb with salt, pepper, and any desired spices.
Grill the lamb for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked to your liking.
Warm the flatbread by wrapping it in foil and heating it in the oven for 5-7 minutes.
Assemble the wraps by spreading tzatziki sauce on the flatbread, followed by slices of lamb, cucumber, tomato, and red onion.
Top with feta cheese (if using) and serve immediately.
